raw.raw:
name: fs.read
description: Read a file.
source:
  type: cli-tool
  command: node
  args: ["tools/read.mjs"]
inputs:
  path:
    type: string
    required: true
scopes:
  - fs.read
runx:
  artifacts:
    wrap_as: file_read
